name: Flyn Conv-Tap
description: Forwards every inbound channel message to flyn-memory-router's conv tier so conversations land in per-owner encrypted SQLite + Graphiti.

routerUrl.description: Base URL of flyn-memory-router (the /api/memory/ingest endpoint is appended).

forwardOutbound.description: Also capture Flyn's own outbound replies via the message_sent hook.

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.help: Turn forwarding on/off without uninstalling the plugin.

routerUrl.label: Memory Router URL
routerUrl.help: Base URL where the conv tier ingest endpoint lives.

forwardOutbound.label: Capture Outbound Replies
forwardOutbound.help: Also record what Flyn sends back to users (default off).

timeoutMs.label: Forward Timeout (ms)
timeoutMs.help: How long to wait for the memory-router response before giving up.
